description:
Description

Dri-Fit Cushion Crew Training Socks (Size 8–12) deliver high-performance comfort with advanced moisture-wicking Dri-Fit fabric that keeps feet dry during running, gym training, and all athletic activities. These cushioned crew socks feature targeted padding for impact protection, arch compression for a secure fit, and breathable mesh zones for ventilation. Reinforced heel and toe improve durability, making them ideal men’s athletic socks for daily workouts, sports, and long-lasting performance.
features: ADVANCED DRI-FIT MOISTURE-WICKING TECHNOLOGY – Keeps feet dry and cool during intense workouts. The Dri-Fit fabric quickly removes sweat, preventing discomfort and odor build-up during training sessions.
CUSHIONED SUPPORT FOR MAXIMUM COMFORT – Targeted cushioning in high-impact areas absorbs shock, reduces fatigue, and improves overall performance. Ideal for running, gym training, and daily wear.
SNUG CREW-LENGTH FIT WITH ARCH COMPRESSION – Provides stable support, prevents slipping, and enhances foot alignment. Secure fit stays in place during high-intensity movement.
BREATHABLE MESH ZONES FOR IMPROVED AIRFLOW – Strategically placed ventilation panels increase airflow to keep your feet cool and prevent overheating in shoes or sneakers.
DURABLE, ATHLETIC PERFORMANCE DESIGN (SIZE 8–12) – Built for long-lasting wear with reinforced heel & toe. Perfect for athletes, runners, gym enthusiasts, or anyone needing reliable training socks.
title: Nike Dri-Fit Cushion Crew Training Socks White Adult 8-12 Unisex (2025)
